body: {"rationale":"Strong bead overall: title is imperative and names subsystem+change; description carries explicit PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE with file:line refs / PROPOSED FIX / OUT-OF-SCOPE; AC is numbered (14 items), names Test* functions (AC7, AC8, AC12), and closes with the required `go test ./cmd/...` gate (AC13) and `lefthook run pre-commit` gate (AC14); labels carry phase:2, area:*, kind:feature, and spec:FEAT-011 cross-ref; parent and deps are explicit; no /tmp or chat references; standalone. Three concerns prevent an 8: (1) AC9 uses 'or' ('via ddx init/update behavior or an explicit repo-local sync command documented in the change'), giving the agent two code paths with no tie-breaker — it may pick the wrong one or produce a half-implementation; (2) AC10 references `make skill-schema` which may not exist in cli/Makefile — if absent the AC silently fails rather than guiding the agent to create or substitute it; (3) AC11 invokes `ddx skills check` with five positional paths — this multi-path signature should be verified against the current CLI surface before dispatch, as an unrecognised flag or arity mismatch will block the gate without a clear fix path.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["AC9: collapse the 'or' to a single deterministic sequence, e.g. 'run make copy-skills to sync cli/internal/skills/ddx, then run ddx update to refresh .agents/skills/ddx, .claude/skills/ddx, and .ddx/skills/ddx; document both steps in the PR description.'","AC10: before dispatch, confirm that `make skill-schema` exists in cli/Makefile; if absent, inline the equivalent invocation (e.g. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go run ./cmd/ddx skill schema skills/ddx/SKILL.md`) so the AC is self-contained and cannot silently pass.","AC11: verify that `ddx skills check` accepts multiple positional path arguments in the current CLI; if not, document the correct per-path invocation or replace with a loop so the AC is runnable verbatim."],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"base_rev":"a35848597f417a1f7973737a3f7ffcbd2b4ed430","classification":"pre_existing_test_failure","decode_warnings":[{"field":"suggested_amendments","warning":"expected array; dropped malformed field","raw_excerpt":"["AC14 (lefthook run pre-commit passes) is currently unachievable due to pre-existing failures in execute-bead gate tests and server worker tests. Add an explicit note to the bead that these tests must be green (or formally skipped) at the pre-push gate before dispatch.","Consider splitting the gate infrastructure fixes (TestExecuteBead_RequiredGatePass_Merges family, TestExecuteBeadEmbeddedAgentStateRedirected) into a blocking prerequisite bead so this bead can push cleanly once that work lands."]"},{"field":"suggested_followup_beads","warning":"expected array; dropped malformed field","raw_excerpt":"["Fix execute-bead gate infrastructure: TestExecuteBead_RequiredGatePass_Merges expects 'pass' but gets 'skipped', TestExecuteBead_RequiredGateFail_Preserves expects 'preserved' but gets 'merged' — required-gate evaluation is not being invoked in the land finalize path (agent_execute_bead_gates_test.go:94).","Fix execute-bead execution bundle layout: TestExecuteBeadContextBudgetFromConfig and TestExecuteBeadEmbeddedAgentStateRedirected fail on missing prompt.md and embedded/ subdir in .ddx/e...[truncated]"},{"field":"classification","warning":"unknown classification","raw_excerpt":"pre_existing_test_failure"},{"field":"recommended_action","warning":"unknown recommended_action","raw_excerpt":"escalate"}],"detail":"landed locally; push failed: git push origin 2299b1b7abdf11f1c8a5d5d70662737b51781860:refs/heads/main: ╭────────────────────────────────────╮
│ 🥊 lefthook v2.1.6  hook: pre-push │
╰────────────────────────────────────╯
┃  full-tests ❯
